# GitHub repository About (reference)

Keep this file in sync when updating the repo **About** section on GitHub.

## Description (≤350 characters)

27 Agent Skills for deterministic USA compliance auditing of AI agents — HIPAA, HITECH, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FedRAMP, CMMC, GLBA, CCPA, state privacy & GDPR. Presidio PHI redaction, MCP templates, Pydantic AI, VS Code & JetBrains plugins.

## Website

## Update via CLI

```bash
gh repo edit vaquarkhan/compliance-agent-skills \
  --description "27 Agent Skills for deterministic USA compliance auditing of AI agents — HIPAA, HITECH, PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FedRAMP, CMMC, GLBA, CCPA, state privacy & GDPR. Presidio PHI redaction, MCP templates, Pydantic AI, VS Code & JetBrains plugins." \
  --homepage "https://github.com/vaquarkhan/compliance-agent-skills#readme" \
  --add-topic compliance --add-topic hipaa --add-topic pci-dss --add-topic soc2 \
  --add-topic fedramp --add-topic agent-skills --add-topic ai-agents \
  --add-topic pydantic-ai --add-topic presidio --add-topic mcp --add-topic audit \
  --add-topic security --add-topic fintech --add-topic healthcare
```
